name: superpowers-bd
description: Beads-integrated workflow skills for TDD, debugging, code review, and wave-based development.

interface.longDescription: Superpowers-BD adds disciplined development workflows to Codex: brainstorming before implementation, TDD, systematic debugging, multi-pass review, beads issue tracking, wave-based parallel execution, native Codex agents, and Codex hooks for session context and edit feedback.
defaultPrompt: Use $brainstorming to shape this feature before coding.
Use $plan2beads to convert my plan into beads work.
